displayName: Brute Force Attack - Multiple Failed Logins
description: Detects brute force attacks by identifying accounts with 10 or more failed login attempts within a 1-hour window from the same IP address. Covers both Windows Security Events (Event ID 4625) and Azure AD Sign-in logs.
query:
let threshold = 10;
let timeWindow = 1h;
// Windows failed logins (Event ID 4625)
let windowsFailed = SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeWindow)
| where EventID == 4625
| where AccountType == "User"
| summarize
    FailedAttempts = count(),
    FirstAttempt   = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastAttempt    = max(TimeGenerated),
    TargetAccounts = make_set(TargetUserName, 10)
    by IpAddress, Computer
| where FailedAttempts >= threshold
| extend
    Source     = "Windows Security Event",
    AccountKey = IpAddress;
// Azure AD failed sign-ins
let aadFailed = SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeWindow)
| where ResultType != "0"
| where ResultDescription !has "MFA"
| summarize
    FailedAttempts = count(),
    FirstAttempt   = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastAttempt    = max(TimeGenerated),
    TargetAccounts = make_set(UserPrincipalName, 10)
    by IPAddress, AppDisplayName
| where FailedAttempts >= threshold
| extend
    Source     = "Azure AD Sign-in",
    IpAddress  = IPAddress,
    Computer   = AppDisplayName,
    AccountKey = IPAddress;
// Union both sources
union windowsFailed, aadFailed
| project
    TimeGenerated  = LastAttempt,
    Source,
    IpAddress,
    Computer,
    FailedAttempts,
    FirstAttempt,
    LastAttempt,
    TargetAccounts
| sort by FailedAttempts desc

alertDetailsOverride.alertDisplayNameFormat: Brute Force Detected: {{FailedAttempts}} failed logins from {{IpAddress}}
alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: {{FailedAttempts}} failed login attempts detected from IP {{IpAddress}} targeting accounts: {{TargetAccounts}}
